title: tsarach #6873
definition:
1) to cry, roar, make a shrill or clear sound
    1a) (Qal) to roar
    1b) (Hiphil) to utter a roar, cry out (a battle cry)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to cry, roar, make a shrill or clear sound
    1a) (Qal) to roar
    1b) (Hiphil) to utter a roar, cry out (a battle cry)

    NASB:  to cry, roar
